title: Build a Marketplace with Stripe Connect
description: End-to-end route for a multi-vendor marketplace: project setup, database, authentication, seller onboarding, split payments, and production deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a Next.js App Router project with TypeScript
Set up Drizzle ORM with a Postgres database (users, sellers, listings, orders)
Add authentication so buyers and sellers can sign in
Set up Stripe Connect Express accounts for seller onboarding and split payments
Add Redis for rate limiting checkout and seller onboarding endpoints
Add error tracking for payment and webhook failures
Deploy to production and configure Stripe webhook endpoints with live keys
